20.reason: This else only attaches to the last if, causing '-' to be printed when the first two conditions are true but the third is false, and also when no expansion should occur.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  This else only attaches to the last if, causing '-' to be printed when the first two conditions are true but the third is false, and also when no expansion should occur.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  This else only attaches to the last if, so when the first two if conditions are true, the else still executes, printing '-' incorrectly.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.1 , reason:  else clause is attached only to the isdigit condition; it causes a hyphen to be printed even when islower or isupper expansion occurred
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.2 , reason:  logical error: else only attached to the last if, prints '-' when previous if conditions were true, causing extra '-'
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.14285714285714285 , reason:  This `else` is incorrectly bound to the `isdigit` check instead of the entire expansion condition chain, causing `-` to be printed even when expansion happens.

10.code: for (int j = s[i - 1] + 1; j < s[i + 1]; j++)
10.reason: Loop condition `j < s[i + 1]` excludes the end character; should be `j <= s[i + 1]`. Also, `i` should be incremented after the loop to skip printing `s[i+1]` again.
